title: CobbleLibs
description: CobbleLibs es una librería base para mods de Minecraft (Fabric) diseñada para facilitar el desarrollo de sistemas avanzados
body:
CobbleLibs is a core library for Minecraft (Fabric) mods designed to facilitate the development of advanced systems such as quests, NPCs, zones, dialogue, interactive menus, and user-friendly text, especially geared towards projects that utilize Cobblemon.

This library centralizes common utilities to avoid duplicate code across mods and provides a solid, flexible, and extensible foundation for developers.
